questions: What did I make two Tuesdays ago?
How did January compare to February?
Revenue from 90 days ago to 30 days ago
Total orders placed on New Year's Day
description: Date/time parsing stress test. Tests named events, relative weekday arithmetic, quarter references, year boundaries, sub-day granularity, and open-ended ranges. Date hallucination from the LLM is the #1 real-world risk.
